252: 				featureSupplierMap);

255: 	@Bean

279: 	@Bean

283: 				this.blockTransactionObserverFactory()::createExecuteCommitObserver, this.timeProvider(), this.lastBlockHeight(),
284: 				blockChainConfiguration.getMaxTransactionsPerBlock(), this.nisConfiguration().getForkConfiguration());

286: 				this.nisCache());

300: 	@Bean

302: 		// initialize network info
303: 		NetworkInfos.setDefault(this.nisConfiguration().getNetworkInfo());
304: 
305: 		// initialize other globals
306: 		final NamespaceCacheLookupAdapters adapters = new NamespaceCacheLookupAdapters(this.namespaceCache());
307: 		if (this.nisConfiguration().ignoreFees()) {
308: 			NemGlobals.setTransactionFeeCalculator(new ZeroTransactionFeeCalculator());
309: 		} else {
310: 			NemGlobals.setTransactionFeeCalculator(new DefaultTransactionFeeCalculator(adapters.asMosaicFeeInformationLookup(),
311: 					() -> this.blockChainLastBlockLayer.getLastBlockHeight().next(), new BlockHeight[]{
312: 							new BlockHeight(BlockMarkerConstants.FEE_FORK(this.nisConfiguration().getNetworkInfo().getVersion() << 24)),
313: 							new BlockHeight(
314: 									BlockMarkerConstants.SECOND_FEE_FORK(this.nisConfiguration().getNetworkInfo().getVersion() << 24))
315: 					}));

318: 		NemGlobals.setBlockChainConfiguration(this.nisConfiguration().getBlockChainConfiguration());
319: 		NemStateGlobals.setWeightedBalancesSupplier(this.weighedBalancesSupplier());
320: 
321: 		return new NisMain(this.blockDao, this.nisCache(), this.networkHostBootstrapper(), this.nisModelToDbModelMapper(),
322: 				this.nisConfiguration(), this.blockAnalyzer(), System::exit);

2. `VariableDeclarationExpr` constructor needs to use `VariableDeclarator`

<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.NodeList;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.body.MethodDeclaration;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.body.VariableDeclarator;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression;
9: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
10: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.NameExpr;
11: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.VariableDeclarationExpr;
12: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.BlockStmt;
13: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.ExpressionStmt;
14: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.ReturnStmt;
15: import com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.Statement;
16: 
17: import java.io.File;
18: import java.io.IOException;
19: import java.nio.file.Files;
20: import java.nio.file.Paths;
21: import java.util.ArrayList;
22: import java.util.List;
23: 
24: public class Main {
25:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
26:         if (args.length < 1) {
27:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <path-to-java-file>");
28:             System.exit(1);
29:         }
30: 
31:         String filePath = args[0];
32:         File file = new File(filePath);
33:         
34:         if (!file.exists()) {
35:             System.err.println("File not found: " + filePath);
36:             System.exit(1);
37:         }
38: 
39:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
40:         
41:         cu.findAll(MethodDeclaration.class).forEach(method -> {
42:             if (method.getTypeAsString().equals("Flyway") || method.getType().asString().contains("Flyway")) {
43:                 transformFlywayMethod(method);
44:             }
45:         });
46: 
47:         String transformedCode = cu.toString();
48:         Files.write(Paths.get(filePath), transformedCode.getBytes());
49:         
50:         System.out.println("Transformation complete: " + filePath);
51:     }
52: 
53:     private static void transformFlywayMethod(MethodDeclaration method) {
54:         BlockStmt body = method.getBody().orElseThrow();
55:         NodeList<Statement> statements = body.getStatements();
56:         List<Statement> newStatements = new ArrayList<>();
57:         
58:         VariableDeclarationExpr flywayVarDecl = null;
59:         List<ExpressionStmt> setterCalls = new ArrayList<>();
60:         ReturnStmt returnStmt = null;
61:         
62:         for (Statement stmt : statements) {
63:             if (stmt instanceof ExpressionStmt) {
64:                 ExpressionStmt exprStmt = (ExpressionStmt) stmt;
65:                 Expression expr = exprStmt.getExpression();
66:                 
67:                 if (expr instanceof VariableDeclarationExpr) {
68:                     VariableDeclarationExpr varDecl = (VariableDeclarationExpr) expr;
69:                     if (varDecl.getVariable(0).getNameAsString().equals("flyway")) {
70:                         flywayVarDecl = varDecl;
71:                         continue;
72:                     }
73:                 }
74:                 
75:                 if (expr instanceof MethodCallExpr) {
76:                     MethodCallExpr methodCall = (MethodCallExpr) expr;
77:                     if (methodCall.getScope().isPresent() && 
78:                         methodCall.getScope().get() instanceof NameExpr) {
79:                         NameExpr scope = (NameExpr) methodCall.getScope().get();
80:                         if (scope.getNameAsString().equals("flyway")) {
81:                             setterCalls.add(exprStmt);
82:                             continue;
83:                         }
84:                     }
85:                 }
86:             }
87:             
88:             if (stmt instanceof ReturnStmt) {
89:                 returnStmt = (ReturnStmt) stmt;
90:             }
91:         }
92:         
93:         if (flywayVarDecl != null && !setterCalls.isEmpty()) {
94:             MethodCallExpr configureCall = new MethodCallExpr(
95:                 new NameExpr("Flyway"),
96:                 "configure"
97:             );
98:             
99:             MethodCallExpr finalCall = configureCall;
100:             
101:             for (ExpressionStmt setterStmt : setterCalls) {
102:                 MethodCallExpr setterCall = (MethodCallExpr) setterStmt.getExpression();
103:                 String setterName = setterCall.getNameAsString();
104:                 
105:                 if (setterCall.getArguments().size() > 0) {
106:                     Expression arg = setterCall.getArgument(0);
107:                     
108:                     if (setterName.equals("setDataSource")) {
109:                         finalCall = finalCall.addArgument(arg);
110:                     } else if (setterName.equals("setClassLoader")) {
111:                         finalCall = finalCall.addArgument(arg);
112:                     } else if (setterName.equals("setLocations")) {
113:                         finalCall = finalCall.addArgument(arg);
114:                     } else if (setterName.equals("setValidateOnMigrate")) {
115:                         finalCall = finalCall.addArgument(arg);
116:                     }
117:                 }
118:             }
119:             
120:             finalCall = new MethodCallExpr(finalCall, "load");
121:             
122:             VariableDeclarator declarator = new VariableDeclarator(
123:                 flywayVarDecl.getCommonType(),
124:                 "flyway",
125:                 finalCall
126:             );
127:             
128:             VariableDeclarationExpr newVarDecl = new VariableDeclarationExpr(declarator);
129:             
130:             NodeList<Statement> newStatementList = new NodeList<>();
131:             newStatementList.add(new ExpressionStmt(newVarDecl));
132:             
133:             if (returnStmt != null) {

The transformation was applied but the syntax is wrong. The `.configure()` method doesn't take positional arguments - it needs to be chained. Let me look at the transformed code more closely and fix the transformation.

Looking at line 94:
```java
org.flywaydb.core.Flyway flyway = Flyway.configure(this.dataSource(), NisAppConfig.class.getClassLoader(), prop.getProperty("flyway.locations"), Boolean.valueOf(prop.getProperty("flyway.validate"))).load();
```

This is wrong - Flyway.configure() takes no arguments and returns a Configuration.Builder that needs to be chained. The correct syntax should be:
```java
Flyway flyway = Flyway.configure()
    .dataSource(this.dataSource())
    .locations(prop.getProperty("flyway.locations"))
    .validateOnMigrate(Boolean.valueOf(prop.getProperty("flyway.validate")))
    .load();
```

Note: setClassLoader is no longer needed in newer Flyway versions.
